base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of metro_city_map — a ui from 1989 final fight. Metro City between-stage map — Slum/Subway/West Side/Industrial/Bay Area/Uptown progression. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Metro City between-stage map — Slum/Subway/West Side/Industrial/Bay Area/Uptown progression
